data.title: Polygon Achieves Record Stablecoin Transactions Amid Network Growth
data.description: Polygon founder Sandeep Nailwal announced on the X platform that the network recorded 159.9 million stablecoin transactions last week, marking a historic high. According to Odaily, key metrics such as stablecoin transaction volume and active addresses on the Polygon network have also increased, indicating the formation of a 'flywheel effect' in network growth. Additionally, the Polygon PoS network has reached 100,000 checkpoints, demonstrating continued expansion in network usage. Nailwal emphasized that despite the resurgence of the 'crypto is dead' narrative, teams that persist in development often create valuable products during market cycles. He stated that Polygon is accelerating efforts to build the future of on-chain payments.

data.title: Copper Prices Rise Over 1% Following Trump's Comments on Middle East Conflict
data.description: Copper prices have increased by more than 1% after U.S. President Donald Trump suggested that the war in the Middle East could conclude within two to three weeks. According to Jin10, Trump's remarks have sparked a rebound in risk assets, which had previously been heavily impacted by global growth concerns. In March, base metals, excluding aluminum, faced significant downward pressure due to Middle Eastern hostilities disrupting commodity supplies and posing inflationary threats to the global economy. Although Trump's latest timeline is not definitive, his comments have contributed to copper's recovery after a nearly 8% drop last month. Copper had a strong start to the year, reaching a record high of over $14,500 per ton in January.

data.title: Polygon founder: On-chain stablecoin transaction volume on Polygon reached a record high of nearly 160 million transactions last week.
data.description: Polygon founder Sandeep Nailwal stated in an article on the X platform that Polygon's stablecoin transaction volume reached 159.9 million transactions last week, a record high. Simultaneously, key metrics such as on-chain stablecoin transaction volume and active addresses all increased, indicating a "flywheel effect" of network growth is forming. Furthermore, the number of checkpoints on the Polygon PoS network has reached 100,000, demonstrating continued expansion of network usage. Nailwal added that amidst the resurgence of the "crypto is dead" narrative, teams that continuously build their systems often create valuable products during the cycle, and stated that Polygon is accelerating the construction of the future of on-chain payments.

data.title: Nano Labs announced its financial results for the second half of 2025: holding 126,662 BNB and pledging 3,338 BNB.
data.description: Nano Labs, a Nasdaq-listed digital asset treasury company, released its financial results for the second half of 2025, disclosing net revenue of RMB 18.7 million. As of December 31, 2025, it held 126,662 BNB with 3,338 BNB as collateral. The company stated it will further enhance its strategic reserves of crypto assets. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Half an hour ago, a certain on-chain address spent 144,000 USDT to buy back 500,000 SIREN tokens.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a SIREN "market maker" on-chain address spent 144,000 USDT to buy back 500,000 SIREN tokens half an hour ago at a price of $0.288. These 500,000 SIREN tokens were sold at $0.947 per coin for 473,000 USDT in the previous two weeks. After today's price drop, the address controlling the SIREN market currently holds 645 million SIREN tokens, worth $155 million, compared to $1.44 billion a week ago.

data.title: Emerging-Market Assets Rally Amid US-Iran Tension Easing Signals
data.description: Emerging-market assets experienced a rally following indications from the United States and Iran suggesting a potential de-escalation in tensions. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the market's positive response to these developments. Investors are optimistic about the easing of geopolitical tensions, which has contributed to a more favorable environment for emerging-market assets. The signals from both nations have been interpreted as a step towards reducing conflict, encouraging market participants to increase their exposure to these assets. This development comes amid ongoing global economic uncertainties, where geopolitical factors play a significant role in influencing market dynamics.

data.title: Bitcoin Dominates Crypto Social Media Discussions
data.description: Bitcoin has emerged as the leading topic in crypto-related social media discussions, capturing a 28.6% share. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum has taken the lead in AI-related search volume, accounting for 14%. Meanwhile, EdgeX has seen a significant rise, ranking third with an 8% share after climbing 13 positions.

data.title: UX Chain Announces Gradual Shutdown Amid Liquidation Phase
data.description:
UX Chain has announced on the X platform that it will gradually shut down, with its protocol entering the liquidation and exit phase. According to Odaily, users are advised to manage all open positions before the platform-wide liquidation begins on April 30.

The complete shutdown process is expected to be finalized by May 15. To address potential funding gaps, the protocol plans to utilize reserve funds and treasury assets. Additional details will be disclosed through the official governance forum.

data.title: SparkLend Introduces wBTC as Collateral on Lending Platform
data.description: DeFi protocol Spark announced the addition of wBTC as collateral on its lending platform, SparkLend. According to Foresight News, this move aims to enhance the platform's offerings and provide users with more options for collateralizing their loans. SparkLend continues to expand its services in the decentralized finance sector, catering to the growing demand for diverse financial products.

data.title: South Korea's KOSPI Index Surges 7% in a Day
data.description: South Korea's KOSPI index experienced a significant increase, rising by 7% on April 1, according to BlockBeats. The index is currently reported at 5407.10 points, reflecting a strong performance in the market.

data.title: Analysts: Expectations of further monetary easing by the Federal Reserve may return; easing geopolitical risks are beneficial for gold.
data.description: Gold prices edged higher on Wednesday, hitting a near two-week high, mainly supported by a weaker dollar. Marex analyst Edward Meir said that talk of the US potentially ending the war within two to three weeks even without the Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted US stocks and drove gold prices higher. However, renewed inflation expectations could lead to further interest rate increases, limiting upside potential for gold. The market has almost completely ruled out a Fed rate cut this year, whereas before the war, the market had expected two rate cuts this year. OCBC strategist Christopher Wong said that if geopolitical tensions ease further, market expectations for Fed monetary easing could return. In this scenario, real yields are expected to decline, providing support for gold prices. (Jinshi)

data.title: UX Chain announces shutdown: Platform-wide liquidation began on April 30th, with exit planned to be completed by mid-May.
data.description: UX Chain announced on the X platform that it will be gradually shutting down, and its protocol has entered the liquidation and exit phase. The official announcement reminded users to promptly process all open positions before the platform-wide liquidation begins on April 30th. According to the plan, UX Chain expects to complete the entire shutdown process by May 15th. To address potential funding gaps, the protocol will utilize reserves and treasury assets. More details will be disclosed through the official governance forum.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Bloomberg Analyst Warns: Gold and Silver May Have Peaked
data.description: Gold remains above $4,600, but a senior analyst warns that the peak in January might have been a 'once-in-a-generation' historical high. According to Jin10, silver is also facing similar concerns. The ongoing conflict in Iran raises questions about whether it will support gold prices or mark the beginning of a bubble burst.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts warn that gold and silver may have peaked, and the "once-in-a-generation" high may have passed.
data.description: In his April metals market outlook report, Bloomberg Intelligence senior market analyst Mike McGlone stated that gold is facing a tough hurdle, created by excessive speculation at the beginning of the year, with the January peak potentially representing a once-in-a-generation historical high. He noted that gold is still struggling as speculative momentum has transformed the yellow metal from a safe-haven asset into a risk asset. He pointed out that the precious metal's 180-day volatility is more than double that of the S&P 500 and is at its highest quarterly level since 2006. Like gold, silver's surge to $120 per ounce in January may also represent a historic peak. (Kitco)

data.title: Bithumb will list Venice Token (VVV)
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bithumb will launch a trading pair for Venice Token (VVV) in Korean Won.

data.title: SIREN Token Experiences Significant Price Drop
data.description: The SIREN token has experienced a significant decline, dropping over 84% in the past 24 hours, with its current price at 0.27 USDT. According to Foresight News, the token has undergone severe fluctuations over the past week. Users are advised to remain cautious amid these volatile market conditions.

data.title: CaixaBank Secures EU MiCA Authorization for Crypto Services
data.description: CaixaBank has received authorization under the EU's MiCA regulations to operate as a crypto asset service provider, becoming the sixth licensed bank in Spain to offer crypto custody, trading, and transfer services. According to ChainCatcher, the other authorized institutions include BBVA, Openbank (a subsidiary of Santander Group), Cecabank, Renta 4 Banco, and Kutxabank. BBVA was the first to receive approval in 2025 and launched Bitcoin and Ethereum trading and custody services in July of the same year. The MiCA authorization serves as a regulatory passport within the EU, allowing licensed institutions to operate legally without needing to apply in each country. Spain's transition period will end on June 30, 2026, after which unauthorized institutions will be prohibited from providing crypto asset services.

data.title: Stable Token Scheduled for Unlocking on April 8
data.description: Stable (STABLE) tokens are set to be unlocked on April 8 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, data from the Web3 asset platform RootData indicates that approximately 88,889,000 tokens will be released. The value of these tokens is estimated at $25.33 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Trades Above Realized Price, Indicating Accumulation Zone
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading approximately 21% above its realized price of $54,286, according to data from CryptoQuant. This level remains above the threshold that has historically marked cycle bottoms. According to NS3.AI, CryptoQuant analyst Oinonen has identified the current market conditions as an accumulation zone. However, historical data suggests that the 2022 bottom was formed when the spot price was at or below the realized price.

data.title: Empery Digital reduced its holdings by 79 bitcoins last week, bringing its total holdings down to 3,359 bitcoins.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin treasury company Empery Digital disclosed that it sold 79 bitcoins last week at an average price of $71,031, generating approximately $5.6 million in revenue. Its total Bitcoin holdings have decreased to 3,359 bitcoins. The company also disclosed that it has spent approximately $137 million to repurchase 23,630,147 shares of common stock and will continue to sell Bitcoin as needed to fund future share buybacks and potentially repay some outstanding debt. (Businesswire)
